topic: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While)

sections.title: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Clause 1 + conjunction + Clause 2 (joining words, phrases, or sentences). Rules: 'And' adds, 'But' contrasts, 'Or' shows choice, 'So' shows result | 'Because' gives reason, 'Although' shows contrast/concession, 'While' shows simultaneous time or contrast | Conjunctions connect clauses without changing their tense | Common mistake: starting every sentence with 'And' or 'But' informally in writing
sections.formula: Clause 1 + conjunction + Clause 2 (joining words, phrases, or sentences)

examples.hindi: मैं चाय और कॉफी दोनों पीता हूँ।
examples.english: I drink both tea and coffee.

examples.hindi: मैं थका हुआ था, लेकिन मैंने काम पूरा किया।
examples.english: I was tired, but I finished the work.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम चाय या कॉफी पीना चाहोगे?
examples.english: Would you like tea or coffee?

examples.hindi: मुझे देर हो गई, इसलिए मैं जल्दी निकला।
examples.english: I was late, so I left quickly.

examples.hindi: मैं देर से आया क्योंकि ट्रैफिक था।
examples.english: I came late because there was traffic.

examples.hindi: हालांकि वह थका हुआ था, वह काम करता रहा।
examples.english: Although he was tired, he kept working.

sections.title: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Clause 1 + conjunction + Clause 2 (joining words, phrases, or sentences)

examples.hindi: मैं खाना बना रहा था जबकि वह पढ़ रही थी।
examples.english: I was cooking while she was studying.

examples.hindi: वह smart और मेहनती है।
examples.english: She is smart and hardworking.

examples.hindi: मुझे यह पसंद है, लेकिन यह महंगा है।
examples.english: I like this, but it is expensive.

examples.hindi: तुम अभी जा सकते हो या बाद में।
examples.english: You can go now or later.

examples.hindi: बारिश हो रही थी, इसलिए हम अंदर रुके।
examples.english: It was raining, so we stayed inside.

examples.hindi: वह सफल हुआ क्योंकि उसने मेहनत की।
examples.english: He succeeded because he worked hard.

sections.title: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Clause 1 + conjunction + Clause 2 (joining words, phrases, or sentences)

examples.hindi: हालांकि मौसम खराब था, हमने यात्रा की।
examples.english: Although the weather was bad, we traveled.

examples.hindi: मैं पढ़ रहा था जबकि वह सो रहा था।
examples.english: I was studying while he was sleeping.

examples.hindi: हम खुश और उत्साहित थे।
examples.english: We were happy and excited.

examples.hindi: यह अच्छा है, लेकिन इसे बेहतर बनाया जा सकता है।
examples.english: This is good, but it can be improved.

sections.title: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While) — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Conjunctions (And, But, Or, So, Because, Although, While). Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Clause 1 + conjunction + Clause 2 (joining words, phrases, or sentences)

examples.hindi: हम फिल्म देख सकते हैं या घर पर रह सकते हैं।
examples.english: We can watch a movie or stay at home.

examples.hindi: मुझे भूख लगी थी, इसलिए मैंने खाना खाया।
examples.english: I was hungry, so I ate food.

examples.hindi: वह रोई क्योंकि वह दुखी थी।
examples.english: She cried because she was sad.

examples.hindi: हालांकि यह मुश्किल था, हमने कोशिश की।
examples.english: Although it was difficult, we tried.
